title: Willughbeiopsis lanceolata

Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Lanceleaf willughbiea is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
